allies.rationale_text: Systems-thinking complements gestalt-principles-of-perception by helping a visible whole map onto real interrelationships instead of isolated parts.
allies.source_quote: Systems thinking focuses on interrelationships and feedback loops. Gestalt provides a way of perceiving the whole before the parts.

allies.rationale_text: Cognitive-load-theory strengthens gestalt-principles-of-perception by turning structured grouping into lower cognitive burden and faster comprehension.
allies.source_quote: By promoting the organization of information into structured chunks or schemas, Gestalt reduces cognitive load.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Gestalt-principles-of-perception conflicts with representativeness-bias when a familiar-looking pattern is treated as evidence of the underlying cause.
structured_tensions.source_quote: gestalt-principles-of-perception conflicts with representativeness-heuristic (representativeness heuristic) when surface pattern grouping is treated as causal proof.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Gestalt-principles-of-perception conflicts with confirmation-bias when observers select the arrangement that supports what they already believe.
structured_tensions.source_quote: gestalt-principles-of-perception conflicts with confirmation-bias (confirmation bias) when observers privilege perceptual arrangements that support prior beliefs.

curation_notes.summary: Preserved only current-vocabulary first-order seams that were explicit or cleanly warranted by the raw source.
donor_drops: Did not keep donor-shaped or out-of-vocabulary relation surfaces; omission beat weak forcing.
open_questions: Higher-order candidates remain observational only and belong in later selective review rather than in this closure batch.

allies: Wave 4 candidacy remains observational only for this model.
antagonists: Any broader antagonistic surface not preserved here was omitted because the current first-order vocabulary did not justify forcing it.
structured_tensions: Only explicit or cleanly source-supported tensions that survive current-vocabulary discipline were preserved.
